sectionSubtitles.matematica: Logic as a form of care.

sectionIntros.matematica: I study mathematics as a practice of thought, not as a toolbox of techniques. Logic, combinatorics, ontology of formal objects — instruments to inhabit the world of models with rigor, and to ask what survives the change of description.
sectionIntros.fede-e-chiesa: Theology, pastoral work, liturgy: three ways of thinking faith within time. Synodality is not an organizational opinion, it is a grammar of deciding together. The liturgy is not theater, it is a form of common knowing.
sectionIntros.parole: Every language carries a world inside its roots. Latin sees and classifies, Hebrew acts and names. To know a word fully is to hold its history in the palm — and to remember that whoever uses it today is inhabiting it without remembering anymore.
sectionIntros.musica: Cadences, modulations, fugues: music shares with logic a grammar of tension and resolution. Notes here on harmony, time, structure — and on those precise places where mathematics, having dropped the calculation, begins to sound.
sectionIntros.giochi: A perfect game is not a game without rules — it is a game whose rules have a structure. Combinatorial geometry, game theory, game design as thought made experienceable.
sectionIntros.pensieri: Short notes, open fragments, epistemological gaps. The model is not the territory: learning to read what the model is not saying is the subtlest discipline of rigor.

home.eyebrow: Fil d'Or — a space to think
home.heroTitle:
Rigor and meaning.
The same thread.
home.heroBody: I think about systems. Some are algorithms, some are communities, some are games. I study them with the same rigor and the same care.
home.intrecciIntro: Every discipline is a way of inhabiting the real. Mathematics measures it, faith dwells in it, words name it, music makes it vibrate. The golden thread runs through them all.

lavoro.title: Work
lavoro.bio: I model complex problems. Some are optimization algorithms, some are organizations, some are systems of meaning. The tool changes, the method does not.

grafica.title: Design
grafica.subtitle: The mark as a form of thought. Composition is not decoration: it is structure made visible.
grafica.manifesto: I approach design as writing: search for the right proportion, attention to rhythm, cut by subtraction. Good images don't add — they remove whatever obstructed meaning.

chiSono.title: About
chiSono.bio: I study systems — formal, human, linguistic. My background is in theoretical mathematics, with a parallel path through theology, pastoral work, and philosophy of language. I don't see them as separate worlds. The golden thread connects them.
chiSono.cvLinkBlock: Want to see my full path as a curriculum?

footer.thread: The same thread, from the start, every time.
